name: Allegiant Travel CO
business: Allegiant Travel is a leisure travel company focused on providing travel and leisure services and products to residents of under-served cities in the United States. It operates a low-cost, low utilization passenger airline marketed primarily to leisure travelers, selling air transportation on a stand-alone basis and bundled with air-related and third party services and products.

exposures.sentence: We have established an Artificial Intelligence ( AI ) Council to explore and implement AI-driven solutions across various business operations.
We continue to invest in cybersecurity, cyber risk management, vendor risk, and privacy initiatives.
We are relying on Boeing to deliver our new 737 MAX aircraft to support airline growth and to replace aircraft we have designated for retirement or whose leases are expiring.

catalysts.event: Delivery of 11 Boeing 737 MAX aircraft in 2026
catalysts.sentence: Although the contract provides for more deliveries, at this time, we currently expect eleven aircraft to be delivered to us in 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of proposed acquisition of Sun Country Airlines
catalysts.sentence: The proposed transaction is anticipated to close in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of replacement of flight and crew management systems with CAE platform
catalysts.sentence: During 2026 we expect to complete the replacement of our flight and crew management systems with a next-generation platform powered by CAE.

tamClaims.claim: More than 1,400 incremental domestic routes identified for future network growth, over 75% with no current nonstop service
tamClaims.sentence: We have identified more than 1,400 incremental domestic routes as opportunities for future network growth, of which over 75 percent currently have no nonstop service.
